ddls:
CREATE TABLE "challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the challenge */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Level of difficulty for the challenge */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the challenge was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the challenge */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the challenge */,
  "estimated_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time to complete the challenge in minutes */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the challenge is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solutions" (
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solution */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge the solution belongs to */,
  "solution_description" TEXT /* Description of the solution */,
  "solution_code" TEXT /* CSS code for the solution */,
  "valid" INTEGER /* Indicator if the solution is valid */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who submitted the solution */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes for the solution */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes for the solution */,
  "is_official" INTEGER /* Indicates if the solution is officially endorsed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solutions_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solutions_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the author's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenge_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge */,
  "completed_date" TEXT /* Date the challenge was completed */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved for the challenge */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made by the user */,
  "best_score" INTEGER /* Best score achieved by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_progress_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Last active date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solution the feedback is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment for the solution */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the solution */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was created */,
  "reply_to" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback it replies to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_reply_to FOREIGN KEY ("reply_to") REFERENCES feedback ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score accumulated by the user */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user on the leaderboard */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the leaderboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the achievement */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "earned_date" TEXT /* Date the achievement was earned */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solution */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the challenge or solution */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the challenge or solution */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes for the challenge or solution */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the analytics data was created */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* A composite score for user engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenge_tags" (
  "challenge_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge-tag relationship */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_tags_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
